title: SHUT DOWN THE PC
body:
Security Policy Update
From: d100204@mundocorp.com
To: d100000@mundocorp.com

This note is being sent to all employees to notify that as of {date} changes to office serucity policy have been made. All devices should be SHUT DOWN when away from keyboard.

Any violation identified is subjected to adverse action in accordance with Mundo Security Policy Text 4.9 (b).

title: Readme
body:
Floppy Disk Driver 1.0

This driver lets Mundo 95 read and write 3.5" floppy disks.

If a disk is not recognised, check that it is inserted the right way up
and that the write-protect tab is closed, then try again.

title: Readme
body:
PerGen Manual

version: 0.8.13

PerGen (permission generator) is an assistance tool to generate credential which grants permission for respective roles on their devices. This program is restricted to director and above only.

Usage: Select role, last name and first name for any individual in the company and click "generate". A credential file with selected permission will be export to target folder.

Note: Permission is granted at PC boot when the credential is detected. To change permission, export new permission credential and restart PC.
